RMINC 2.0.0.0
  • Reference

RMINC: R interface to the MINC universe

Source: R/RMINC.R
RMINC-package.Rd

RMINC provides a means of accessing and performing statistical analyses on MINC volumes. With facilities to calculate voxel-wise statistics, perform FDR correction, rapidly visualize results, and much more.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/Mouse-Imaging-Centre/RMINC

  • https://wiki.mouseimaging.ca/display/MICePub/RMINC

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/Mouse-Imaging-Centre/RMINC/issues
